evidence_rows.reading: V1.12E opened lawfully as a bounded attribution-review phase.
The project now has a block-level explanation for the first GBDT sidecar gain.

interpretation: V1.12E succeeds once the first same-dataset sidecar gain has a bounded feature-block explanation.
That is enough to close without opening deployment or new data scope.
The next lawful move is owner review of whether the most useful block should drive the next feature or model decision.
